choice: postgres.js (the 'postgres' npm package) via drizzle-orm/postgres-js; drizzle-kit for generate/migrate. A single pooled client (max 10) is memoized on globalThis to survive dev hot-reload.
rationale: [build-originated] Grooming fixed Drizzle + drizzle-kit (d8fa123f) but not the driver. postgres.js is the lightweight, SQL-shaped default that pairs cleanly with drizzle-orm/postgres-js and Railway Postgres; no separate pool manager needed at personal scale.
